title: MagiCraft
description: A Vanilla-ish experience featuring several quality-of-life mods to support a great social time!
body:
A Vanilla+ experience to hang out and have a chill time in the newest update. Heavily inspired by Hermitcraft.

## Brief Mods Overview
- Customization
> Play custom sounds with AudioPlayer, create all manner of custom blocks or items with Custom Roleplay Data*, or even change around how you look with Entity Texture Features* and Entity Model Features*!
- Performance
> The usual suspects of performance enhancing mods are included to boost FPS on any hardware, with shaders available if your system supports them.
- Multiplayer-specific features
> Easily identify your friends' chat messages with Chat Heads, or bypass the text entirely with Simple Voice Chat.
- ...and More!
> There are additional mods that did not fit into the brief overview described here, and the best way to see them all is to give the pack a download and see them in action for yourself!

### Version Number Explanation
X.Y.Z(n)
- X : Major version number. 
> New save highly recommended; Rarely incremented.
- Y : Minor version number.
> Significant additions/removals of content, but not requiring a new save. 
- Z : Patch number
> Mod or config updates, very rarely requires save wipes.
- n : Hotfix index (alphabetical)
> Hotfixes to address broken/misconfigured mods/settings. Optional in version numbers, rarely includes "a".



'* = Once updated for the newest release :)
